name: Local file inbox summary
request: Summarize local .txt notes dropped into an inbox directory and write a markdown digest without sending anything externally.

trigger.description: User or cron runs the workflow against a local inbox folder.

actions: List .txt files in the configured inbox directory.
Extract filename, first line, word count, and action-looking lines.
Write a markdown digest to a local output path.
approval_gates: Approval is required before emailing, posting, deleting, moving, or syncing the digest outside the local machine.

failure_modes: Digest omits a file because the glob pattern is too narrow

rollback: Delete the generated digest file. Source files are read-only and are not modified.

verification.local_dry_run: Create a fixture inbox with two .txt files, run the script in dry-run/read-only mode, and verify the digest includes both filenames.
tests: Input directory missing returns a clear error
Empty input directory creates a digest with zero items
Two fixture files produce two digest entries
